name: UserPreferences
description: Maintains Personality/UserPreferences.md — the agent's record of the user's coding style, libraries, naming conventions, and architectural preferences.

function.name: update_user_preferences
function.description: Update a specific section of the user preferences profile. Read the current preferences first with read_file, then call this tool with the full updated content for the section. Changes take effect in the next session when personality files are reloaded.

content.description: The full new content for the section, formatted as markdown bullet points.

justification.description: Why this preference is being recorded or updated.
